attributes.action: Please stop the war and the murder of innocent humans around the world
attributes.additional_details: Let Britain actually be great, by stopping the war and murder of innocent civilians around the world and listening to the millions that want an end to this horror
attributes.background: To intervene in the right way, stand up to humanity and use its powers to end the war

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Withdraw involvement in war on Iran and seek diplomatic resolution" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/761718
